name: HCA Healthcare, Inc.
summary: PART I General HCA Healthcare, Inc. is one of the leading health care services companies in the United States. At December 31, 2025, we operated 190 hospitals, comprised of 179 general acute care hospitals, seven behavioral hospitals, and four rehabilitation hospitals. In addition, we operated 121 freestanding ambulatory surgery centers (ASCs) and 31 freestanding endoscopy centers. Our facilities are located in 19 states and England. The terms Company, HCA, HCA Healthcare, we, our or us, as used...
